/usr/bin/c++  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=1 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rog_rl_service.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rog_rl_service.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rog_rl_service.dir/src/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rog_rl_service.dir/src/agent.cpp.o -o rog_rl_service   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib /home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a /usr/lib/libnvidia-ml.so _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-component.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-dom.a _deps/ftxui-build/libftxui-screen.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/posiedon/libtorch_cpu/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
